Dean of Students Office Feedback

Your well-being and success are at the heart of everything we do. The Dean of Students Office is committed to supporting you through welfare services, accommodation, student organizations, and disciplinary matters. Your feedback helps us create a more supportive and inclusive campus environment.

1. What was the primary purpose of your visit to the Dean of Students Office? (Select one)

2. How would you rate the quality of student support and guidance provided? (Empathy, understanding, relevance of advice)

3. How would you rate the following student services?

Service / Support Excellent Good Fair Poor N/A
Student Welfare Support
Accommodation/Housing Assistance
Disciplinary Process Fairness
Student Organizations/Societies Support
Financial Aid/Bursary Support

4. How accessible was the Dean of Students Office and its personnel? (Office hours, appointment availability, location)

5. How would you rate your interaction with the Dean of Students Office staff?

6. How would you rate the fairness and impartiality of the office in handling student matters?

7. How effective is communication from the Dean of Students Office to students?

8. How would you rate the confidentiality and privacy when discussing personal matters?

9. Overall, how would you rate your Dean of Students Office experience today? *

10. Please share your specific Complaints and/or Compliments to help us improve. (Your feedback matters)

Your feedback is confidential and used to improve university services.
